prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 陕西师范大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第 63–65 名（2026 年第 63 名），属中上游水平，师范类头部院校；2024 年声誉评价为偏负面（师德师风事件），但 2025–2026 年声誉周期未出现明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 15（高热），手写录取通知书等正面内容持续传播，整体关注度较高；中国语言文学 A-、心理学 A-、教育学 A-，共 3 个 A- 学科，在师范类院校中学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度近年呈分化观望态势；计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业持续高热 推荐，该校相关专业（计算机类、数学类、物理学类）受益于整体热度。河南省 2026 年高考总人数约 120 万（含不确定标记），较 2025 年约 90.7 万大幅增加约 32%，竞争显著加剧；陕西师范大学位于陕西西安，属邻省，对河南考生有较强的地域吸引力；该校在河南招生规模较大，2025 年物理类+历史类合计 165 人，占该校全国招生一定比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移、2026 年扩招约 18.8%、本省考生总数大幅增加约 32% 以及学校声誉平稳偏正面等因素，扩招与考生增加效应部分对冲，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约 40802 名，区间 40302–41302 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 24547→32661→29681→25762→36486, with significant fluctuations in the past 3 years. In 2025, it shifted back by about 10724 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 36486. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for Physics Category (including Science) was: 113 in 2021, 102 in 2022, 109 in 2023, 128 in 2024, and 117 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 139 students, an increase of about 18.8% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shaanxi Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 63–65 in recent years (63rd in 2026), placing it at an upper-middle level and among the top normal universities. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to teacher ethics incidents), but in the 2025–2026 reputation cycle, no significant negative public opinion emerged. It ranks 15th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with positive content such as handwritten admission letters continuously spreading, resulting in overall high attention. It has three A- disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, and Education A-, demonstrating outstanding disciplinary strength among normal universities, which attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors has shown a trend of divergence and wait-and-see in recent years. Computer, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly popular and recommended, and related majors at this university (Computer, Mathematics, Physics) benefit from the overall heat. In 2026, the total number of Henan Province college entrance exam takers is about 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), a significant increase of about 32% compared to about 907,000 in 2025, leading to intensified competition. Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a neighboring province, which has a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan, with a total of 165 students in Physics and History categories in 2025, accounting for a certain proportion of its national enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the enrollment expansion of about 18.8% in 2026, the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of local candidates, and the generally stable and slightly positive reputation of the university, the effects of expansion and increased candidates partially offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift back slightly from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 40802, with a range of 40302–41302.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (40302–41302), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 40000), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Mathematics and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, choose cautiously and prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2955 → 3609 → 3838 → 4526 → 4725, with a continuous backward shift over the past 4 years, accumulating a shift of about 1770 places; the 2025 baseline is about 4725 places. The university's enrollment plan in Henan Province for History Category (including Liberal Arts): 44 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 50 in 2024, 48 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 71, a significant expansion of about 47.9% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 63rd, with stable or rising rankings in recent years, solid position among top normal universities; reputation slightly negative in 2024 (teacher ethics incident), no significant negative public opinion in the 2025–2026 reputation cycle; Douyin popularity ranking 15th (high heat), positive content such as handwritten admission letters continuously spreading, high application attention; Chinese Language and Literature A-, Education A-, highly matching with History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, History, Education, etc.), strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of about 47.9% in 2026, and the increase of about 32% in History Category candidates in the province, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, so competition is expected to ease slightly, with rankings shifting backward; predicted minimum ranking approximately 6053, range 5553–6553.
